documents.message: You need 10th, 12th marksheets, ID proof, and photos.

process.message: Fill form, submit documents, pay fees.

courses.message: We offer B.Tech, BCA, MCA, MBA, and AI specialization.

btech.message: B.Tech includes CSE, IT, Mechanical, Civil.

bca.message: BCA focuses on software and web development.

mca.message: MCA is advanced computer application program.

ai_course.message: AI course includes ML, NLP, Computer Vision.

payment.message: Fees can be paid online or in installments.

hostel.message: Separate hostels for boys and girls.

mess.message: Mess provides healthy meals 3 times a day.

library.message: Library has 10,000+ books and digital access.

ai.message: Ask about AI topics like BFS, DFS, A*, Minimax.

astar.message: A* uses cost + heuristic to find shortest path.

minimax.message: Minimax is used in game AI.

hill_climbing.message: Hill climbing finds optimal solution locally.
